sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95289" key="skulakodro/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῠλᾰκο-δρόμος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὥρη</foreign>, <sense id="n95289.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the dog-days</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
